Admission Types

Prison populations are shaped by two primary groups: new court commitments, or individuals newly incarcerated for a criminal offense, and parole returns and revocations, those who return to prison for failing to meet the conditions of their parole.

No Data. Virginia did not submit data to the National Corrections Reporting Program in 2020.
